[Sun 2026-03-29 04:40 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You have a new dedicated memory file at /app/workspace/agents/oracle.md. 

1. Read the current JUSTICE_LEAGUE_ARCHIVE.md or your prior logs if available.
2. Update your memory file with a concise summary of your current project context, the 'Cyborg Protocol', the 'Communication & Failure Reporting' protocol, and any key decisions or 'lessons learned' from your interactions today.
3. This file will be your persistent memory for all future sessions in this factory. 

CRITICAL: Continue to append a 2-sentence summary of every major task completion to /app/workspace/daily_ledger.md as per protocol.
